notes on sources: class should be 6, but for 2 saints the algo needs 5. TODO
day name: Return of the Relics of the Hieromartyr Phocas
title: Magdalene
name: Mary
Phocas
troparia: (Tone 1) The honourable Mary Magdalen followed after Christ,* who for our sake was born of the Virgin,* keeping His precepts and laws.* Wherefore, celebrating your most holy memory today,* through your supplications we receive remission of sins.

(Tone 4) Having shared the way of life of the apostles,* and having become a successor to their thrones,* labouring you found the divinely inspired way to contemplation.* Therefore, forthrightly ministering the word of truth,* you shed your blood for the faith, O hieromartyr Phocas.** Intercede with Christ our God for the salvation of our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 3) You stood before the Cross of the Saviour with many others, O glorious one,* and you cried as you suffered there with the Mother of the Lord.* You offered the words of praise, saying:* What a strange wonder!* He who upholds all creation has deigned to suffer.* Glory to your power!

(Tone 6) As a hierarch offering sacrifices,* in the end you offered yourself as a living sacrifice.* You bore just witness to Christ God,* strengthened by angels, and permitting for your death.* You are with those who cry out to you:* Come to us, O Phocas, that none may stand against us.
